5-meo-amt.dose_note: NOTE: Hospitalizations have occured with as doses as low as 8mg
5-meo-amt.name: 5-meo-amt

properties.dose: Oral Threshold: 0.5-1mg Light: 1-2mg Common: 2-4mg Strong: 4-6mg | NOTE: Hospitalizations have occured with as doses as low as 8mg
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.summary: A long-acting psychedelic and entactogenic tryptamine. The drug is structurally related to aMT. The drug is reported to be very potent and is sometimes sold on blotters. There have been a few reports of the drug being sold as LSD, however it seems this is rare. The drug may be an MAOI, caution is advised when dosing.
